prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约12949名，2023年大幅前移至6107名，2024年继续前移至4626名，2025年进一步前移至4146名，近四年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字不断减小），累计前移约8803名；2025年基准位次约4146名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022-2024年均为10人，2025年增至12人，2026年计划10人，较2025年缩招2人（-16.7%），缩招意味着竞争略有缓解，对位次有下移（数字减小）的推动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学是211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第124名、2022年第127名、2023年第127名、2024年第131名、2025年第131名、2026年第125名，近年排名稳定在125名左右，属于中游偏上211院校；该校在2021-2026年声誉舆情文件中未被收录，说明近年无明显负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名第105位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度相对平稳。历史投档异常记录中亦未出现辽宁大学，无断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，辽宁大学仅应用经济学获评A-，其余学科未进入A-及以上等级；A-及以上学科仅1个，优势学科集中度较低。招生专业中会计学、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等虽非A级学科，但属社会热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，社会报考热度较高；宁夏考生总数2025年物理类约44491人，2026年总考生约66000人（不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约65%估算，2026年物理类考生约42900人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解。；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在宁夏招生人数较少（2025年12人，2026年10人），属于跨省招生，本地生源占比低，宁夏考生对该校的地域偏好无明显偏向。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2022-2025年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划缩招（12→10人）使竞争略有缓解、宁夏物理类考生总数小幅减少、学校声誉平稳无负面舆情、优势学科集中度较低等因素，在2025年基准位次4146名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次继续小幅前移；预测最低位次约3701名，区间3201-4201名。

- 会计学

- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（3201-4201名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<3201名）可重点冲刺会计学、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间下限（>4201名）建议以三档专业保底并考虑其他院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank was approximately 12949, which significantly advanced to 6107 in 2023, continued to advance to 4626 in 2024, and further advanced to 4146 in 2025, showing a continuous advancing trend over the past four years (rank numbers decreasing), with a cumulative advance of about 8803 positions; the baseline rank for 2025 is approximately 4146; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Ningxia was 10 students from 2022 to 2024, increased to 12 in 2025, and planned for 10 in 2026, a reduction of 2 students (-16.7%) compared to 2025, which means slightly eased competition and a downward push on rank (number decreasing).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 124th in 2021, 127th in 2022, 127th in 2023, 131st in 2024, 131st in 2025, and 125th in 2026, with stable rankings around 125th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university was not included in the reputation and public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, indicating no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; the overall TikTok school popularity ranking is 105th, rated as "average", with short video exposure at a medium-low level, and relatively stable application attention. There is no record of abnormal historical admission scores for Liaoning University, with no signs of gaps or sharp drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University only had Applied Economics rated A-, and no other disciplines reached A- or above; only one discipline is A- or above, indicating a relatively low concentration of advantageous disciplines. Among the enrollment majors, Accounting, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science, although not A-level disciplines, are socially popular directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have been consistently rated as "highly recommended" or "recommended" in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application enthusiasm; the total number of Ningxia examinees in the physics category in 2025 is approximately 44491, and in 2026 the total examinees are about 66000 (uncertain mark), estimated at about 42900 physics category examinees in 2026 based on the recent proportion of about 65%, a slight decrease compared to 2025, leading to a slight easing of competition pressure. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, with a small enrollment number in Ningxia (12 in 2025, 10 in 2026), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with a low proportion of local students, and no obvious regional preference among Ningxia examinees for this university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous advancing trend of rankings from 2022 to 2025, the planned enrollment reduction in 2026 (12 to 10 students) leading to slightly eased competition, a slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees in Ningxia, stable university reputation with no negative public opinion, and relatively low concentration of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission rank in 2026 will continue to advance slightly from the 2025 baseline rank of 4146; the predicted minimum rank is approximately 3701, with a range of 3201-4201.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range (3201-4201), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach and Tier 3 majors as safety; if your rank is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<3201), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Accounting, Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your rank is close to the lower limit of the range (>4201), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety and consider other universities.
